message:
fix(alloc,journal): resolve workspace gate blockers for FsGeometry and clippy

Fix two compilation/lint blockers preventing clean workspace builds:

- Add missing first_inode field to FsGeometry struct initialization in
  batch_alloc benchmark fixture, required after the FsGeometry struct
  gained the first_inode member (addresses bd-nzv3.1.1)
- Suppress clippy::too_many_lines warning on Jbd2Writer::commit_transaction
  via #[expect] attribute, as the function's length is inherent to the
  journal commit protocol and splitting it would reduce clarity (addresses
  bd-nzv3.1.2)
- Update issue tracking: expand bd-nzv3 epic description with acceptance
  criteria; mark bd-nzv3.1.1 and bd-nzv3.1.2 as in_progress

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
